title: Gazette Notification - Dr. P.C. Rao, ITLOS
description: Gazette Notification - Dr. P.C. Rao, ITLOS
file_title: Gazette Notification-Mr P. C. Rao, ITLOS-20 April 2000.pdf
text: REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/99 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 306 ] NEW DELHI, WEDNESDAY, MAY 3,2000/VAISAKHA13,1922 MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 28th April, 2000 S.O. 430(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 3 of the United Nations (Privileges and Immuni- ties) Act. 1947 (46 of 1947). the Central Government hereby declares that the provisions of Section 18(a) & (b) shall, mutatis mutandis, to Shri P.C. Rao, Member of the International Tribunal for the Law of the Sea. However, Section 18 (b) will be applicable only for such time as Shri Rao continues to be a member of the International Tribunal for the Law of the sea. 2. This notification shall come into force on the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. [F. No. U-II/106/18/97] A. GOPINATHAN, Jt. Secy. 1262 Gl/2000 Printed by the Manager, Govt of India Press, Ring Road. Mayapuri. New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller publications, Delhi-110054 -- 1 of 2 -- -- 2 of 2 --
